use_codes.desc: INDICATED FOR THE ONCE-DAILY MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF ASTHMA AS PROPHYLACTIC THERAPY IN PATIENTS AGED 12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER
FOR ONCE-DAILY MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF ASTHMA AS PROPHYLACTIC THERAPY IN PATIENTS AGED 5 YEARS AND OLDER

indications.text:
7 DRUG INTERACTIONS
7.1 Inhibitors of Cytochrome P450 3A4

7 DRUG INTERACTIONS
7.1 Inhibitors of Cytochrome P450 3A4

7 DRUG INTERACTIONS
7.1 Inhibitors of Cytochrome P450 3A4
1.1 Treatment of Asthma
8 USE IN SPECIFIC POPULATIONS

1.1 Treatment of Asthma
ARNUITY ELLIPTA is indicated for the once-daily maintenance treatment of asthma as
prophylactic therapy in patients aged 5 years and older.
Important Limitation of Use
ARNUITY ELLIPTA is NOT indicated for the relief of acute bronchospasm.

1.1 Treatment of Asthma
ARNUITY™ ELLIPTA® is indicated for the once-daily maintenance treatment of asthma
as prophylactic therapy in patients aged 12 years and older.
Important Limitation of Use: ARNUITY ELLIPTA is NOT indicated for the relief of
acute bronchospasm.
